title: stylidium vitiense
intro: Stylidium vitiense, commonly known as the Viti Stylidium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Stylidiaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stylidium vitiense include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Stylidium vitiense can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to make a decoction.
